speaker: CERIMON
text: Madam, this letter and some certain jewels

speaker: CERIMON
text: Lay with you in your coffer, which are

speaker: CERIMON
text: At your command. Know you the character?

speaker: THAISA
text: It is my lord’s. That I was shipped at sea

speaker: THAISA
text: I well remember, even on my bearing time,

speaker: THAISA
text: But whether there delivered, by the holy gods

speaker: THAISA
text: I cannot rightly say. But since King Pericles,

speaker: THAISA
text: My wedded lord, I ne’er shall see again,

speaker: THAISA
text: A vestal livery will I take me to,

speaker: CERIMON
text: You purpose as you speak, Diana’s temple

speaker: CERIMON
text: Is not distant far, where you may abide

speaker: CERIMON
text: Till your date expire. Moreover, if you

speaker: CERIMON
text: Please, a niece of mine shall there attend you.

speaker: THAISA
text: My recompense is thanks, that’s all;

speaker: THAISA
text: Yet my good will is great, though the gift small.
